title: Pyxel
body:
![banner](https://i.postimg.cc/CLx6n44h/Untitled.jpg)
### About
Pyxel is modern 1.9 pvp resource pack with crisp artstyle.

---
### This project is in early development state!
That means that most of textures are not done yet. If you noticed any issues, please report them [here](https://github.com/nederliver/Pyxel/issues).
